Kadir Has University

New Media and Communication

Kadir Has University New Media and Communication Department aims to train professionals specialised in content production, data analytics and digital communication strategies in the digitalising world. The department, which provides education in English, includes current topics such as social media expertise, big data analysis, digital content production and blockchain applications in its curriculum. Students can produce content with technological equipment such as 360 cameras, Gimbal and GoPro in the New Media Lab, develop mobile applications and exhibit their projects on the cibalipostasi.com platform. International experience opportunities are offered through collaborations with the sector and Erasmus+ agreements.
